name: Stuff.io
description_short: True digital ownership for media you can resell.
description_long: Digital-ownership platform on Cardano letting consumers own, share, gift, or resell their movies, music, ebooks, audiobooks, and podcasts as NFTs.

products.name: Stuff.io Marketplace
products.description: Multi-chain Web3 marketplace for buying and owning digital media – videos, music, films, books – as resellable NFTs.
